creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
I think this is a regression.
X used to work ok.
Now when I launch X, I get:

[ 14602.295] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/mis
c/, removing from list!
[ 14602.295] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TTF
/, removing from list!
[ 14602.297] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/OTF
/, removing from list!
[ 14602.298] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/Typ
e1/, removing from list!
[ 14602.299] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/100
dpi/, removing from list!
[ 14602.300] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/75d
pi/, removing from list!
[ 14602.301] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/ter
minus-font/, removing from list!
[ 14602.301] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/dej
avu/, removing from list!
[ 14602.302] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/mis
c/, removing from list!
[ 14602.302] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TTF
/, removing from list!
[ 14602.302] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/OTF
/, removing from list!
[ 14602.303] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/Typ
e1/, removing from list!
[ 14602.304] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/100
dpi/, removing from list!
[ 14602.305] [dix] Could not init font path element /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/75d
pi/, removing from list!

X is stared, but only fixed font is available,
which gives lots of errors from lots of programs,
e.g. xterm, xpdf, xfig.

Trying to launch browsers make X segfault. I presume
this is because of the lack of ports, but perhaps
this is a separate issue.

# pkg info -xo xorg
xorg-fonts-7.7                 x11-fonts/xorg-fonts
xorg-fonts-100dpi-7.7          x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-100dpi
xorg-fonts-75dpi-7.7           x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-75dpi
xorg-fonts-cyrillic-7.7        x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-cyrillic
xorg-fonts-miscbitmaps-7.7     x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-miscbitmaps
xorg-fonts-truetype-7.7_1      x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-truetype
xorg-fonts-type1-7.7           x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-type1
xorg-server-1.12.4_7,1         x11-servers/xorg-server
#

I have in /etc/X11/xorg.conf

Section "Files"
        ModulePath   "/usr/local/lib/xorg/modules"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/misc/"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TTF/"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/OTF/"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/Type1/"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/100dpi/"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/75dpi/"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/terminus-font/"
        FontPath     "/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/dejavu/"
EndSection

All font files are indeed installed, and
the permissions are correct:

# find /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/ -name "fonts.*"
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/local/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/local/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/util/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/util/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/Type1/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/Type1/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/encodings/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/encodings/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/OTF/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/OTF/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TTF/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TTF/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/dejavu/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/dejavu/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/misc/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/misc/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/misc/fonts.alias
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/cyrillic/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/cyrillic/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/cyrillic/fonts.alias
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/75dpi/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/75dpi/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/75dpi/fonts.alias
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/100dpi/fonts.scale
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/100dpi/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/100dpi/fonts.alias
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/terminus-font/fonts.dir
/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/terminus-font/fonts.scale
#

I build packages in poudriere on another box,
and then install on this box. This seemed to work
fine until 2-3 days ago.

I tried deinstalling / reinstalling all ports,
still no luck.

I tried building xorg-server from ports on this
box directly - still no luck.

I've run mkfontscale and mkfontdir on all font
dirs - no luck.

I'm out of guesses, so please help.
